zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude de Lorraine於大約1077年出生在法國洛萊時，她的父親Thierry II de Lorraine34歲，母親Hedwig von Formbach29歲。她於1099年與Floris II van Holland在荷蘭霍蘭弗拉爾丁恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1144年5月23日在荷蘭-拉藍德利斯包格享年68歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德利斯包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude de Lorraine于大约1077年出生在法国洛萊时，她的父亲Thierry II de Lorraine34岁，母亲Hedwig von Formbach29岁。她于1099年与Floris II van Holland在荷兰霍蘭弗拉爾丁恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1144年5月23日在荷兰-拉藍德利斯包格享年68岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德利斯包格。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude de Lorraine was born about 1077, in Lorraine, France, her father, Thierry II de Lorraine, was 34 and her mother, Hedwig von Formbach, was 29. She married Floris II van Holland in 1099, in Vlaardingen, Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 May 1144, in Rijnsburg, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 68, and was buried in Rijnsburg, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.Egmond aan den Hoef, Egmond-Binnen, Holl: Egmond aan den Hoef, Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Pays-Bas
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude de Lorraine est née environ 1077, à Lorraine, France, son père, Thierry II de Lorraine, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Formbach, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Floris II van Holland en 1099, à Vlaardingen, Holland, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 mai 1144, à Rijnsburg, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Rijnsburg, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.Egmond aan den Hoef, Egmond-Binnen, Holl: Egmond aan den Hoef, Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Niederlande
de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude de Lorraine um 1077 in Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thierry II de Lorraine 34 und ihre Mutter Hedwig von Formbach 29. Sie hat 1099 in Vlaardingen, Holland, Niederlande Floris II van Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. Mai 1144 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Rijnsburg, Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Rijnsburg, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Lorraine è nata il circa 1077 nel Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Thierry II de Lorraine, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Hedwig von Formbach, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Floris II van Holland nel 1099, nel Vlaardingen, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 maggio 1144, nel Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Lorraineが約1077年にフランスロレィヌで生まれた時，父Thierry II de Lorraineは34歳，母Hedwig von Formbachは29歳であった。1099年にオランダホーランドvラアルディンジェンでFloris II van Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1144年5月23日にオランダズイド-hオランドリジンスブルグで68歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドリジンスブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Egmond aan den Hoef, Egmond-Binnen, Holl: 네덜란드 홀랜드 그몽-빈 그몽 아아 든 호프
ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Lorraine(이)가 대략 1077년 프랑스 로레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thierry II de Lorraine(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig von Formbach(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1099년 네덜란드 홀랜드 블라아르딩에서 Floris II van Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1144년 5월 23일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 리j스버그에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 리j스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Lorraine nasceu aproximadamente 1077, em Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thierry II de Lorraine, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Formbach, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Floris II van Holland em 1099, em Vlaardingen, Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de maio de 1144, em Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.Egmond aan den Hoef, Egmond-Binnen, Holl: эгмонд аан ден хоеф, эгмонд-биннен, холланд, Нидерланды
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude de Lorraine родилась около 1077 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Thierry II de Lorraine было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Formbach, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Floris II van Holland в 1099 г. в местности влаардинген, холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 мая 1144 г. в местности риджнсбург, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности риджнсбург, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude de Lorraine nació aproximadamente 1077, en Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thierry II de Lorraine, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Formbach, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Floris II van Holland en 1099, en Vlaardingen, Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1144, en Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Rijnsburg, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
